messages.content: Hello sir, I'm ready to assist you. What can I do for you today?
what is the gold rate as of today
As of today, the gold rate in Dubai is approximately AED 623.00 per gram for 24-carat gold, and using the current exchange rate, it converts to around ₹1,52,111 per 10 grams in Indian Rupees.
You live in Mysuru, Karnataka, India, sir.
